findings.description: `GlobalErrorHandler` is a PascalCase class name referenced in s2 content (for ThreadDeath and VirtualMachineError exception handling: "ログ出力は :doc:`GlobalErrorHandler` で行われる") but is absent from s2 hints.
findings.source_evidence: s2 exception table rows for `java.lang.ThreadDeath` and `java.lang.VirtualMachineError`: "(ログ出力は :doc:`GlobalErrorHandler` で行われる。)"
